rationale: Changed title derivation to use objectiveInstructions (already trimmed) instead of raw templateFeatureRequest, eliminating the leading-newline split bug.
Added resolvedTool/resolvedSkill objects that reflect effectiveSkillId when a template slug is used, keeping tool.name and skill.id in sync with the skills array.
Informational Gemini review summary; no action needed.
Boilerplate Codex review summary; no action needed.
tool.name and skill.id now reflect effectiveSkillId (template slug) when no explicit skill is selected, so the persisted submission carries the preset slug.
Derived title is now clamped to 150 chars (matching backend _MAX_TASK_TITLE_LENGTH) with ellipsis truncation.
Title is now derived from objectiveInstructions (the same resolved objective text submitted to the backend) instead of only templateFeatureRequest.
Derived title is clamped to 150 chars, matching backend storage constraints.
Added assertions in the preset-submit test for skills array, derived title, tool.name, and skill.id.
